entry.title: SAP BW/4HANA Data Model for SAP S/4HANA Group Reporting
entry.content:
Co-Authored: Andreas Tenholte and Philip Fengler

We in the CoE EMEA Team for Data Warehousing & Data Management have developed a Group Reporting data model for SAP BW/4HANA. This model is currently in pilot phase and already successfully rolled out to several customers.

In the following, we would like to give you a brief overview of the model's target audience, its structure and functionality, as well as information on how to get access to the model if you are interested. So stay tuned, it's worth reading 😊

 

Target Group for the SAP BW/4HANA Group Reporting Model

A data model for SAP BW/4HANA has been requested by several customers who have one or more of the following requirements:

  • Use of SAP BW/4HANA as the central reporting platform for the execution of financial consolidation reporting.
  • The need to combine group reporting data with analytical data such as HCM KPIs, production data, etc.
  • Use the flexible analysis authorization framework to fine-tune row-level access based on hierarchy nodes such as consolidation unit and profit center.
  • The need to load and distribute group reporting data to other systems.

 

Interrelation between SAP S/4HANA Group Reporting and the BW Group Reporting Model

The provided SAP BW/4HANA data model is implemented based on the data structures used in SAP S/4HANA Group Reporting and leverages standard CDS views delivered as part of SAP S/4HANA, to extract and load the data into the receiving data model in SAP BW/4HANA. This data is then made available for reporting by applying group reporting logic including hierarchy elimination logic.

 

About the SAP BW/4HANA Group Reporting Model

The SAP BW/4HANA data model consists of Z*-objects (BW objects, ABAP CDS Views, HANA Calculation Views), covering transactional and master data. The model is aligned with SAP best practices, such as “Layered-Scalable-Architecture optimized for HANA” (LSA++) and HANA-optimized business content. The BW data model is currently not part of the official SAP BW/4 Business Content. This aspect requires further elaboration.

The following Group Reporting functionality is covered by the data model:

  • Version relations including extension versions
  • Group derivation logic based on the group structure
  • Hierarchy elimination
  • Period mode

The reports that can be created using the SAP BW/4HANA data model for Group Reporting provide the same functionality as the SAP S/4HANA embedded analytics reports of Group Data Analysis.

It is also possible to extend the functional scope of the Group Reporting data model to meet individual business requirements as part of the service delivery (see below):

  • Downporting the SAP BW/4HANA data model to SAP BW on HANA 7.50
  • Reporting rules to cover Cash Flow reporting, that corresponds to Group Data Analysis including Reporting Rules in SAP S/4HANA Embedded Analytics
  • Handling of physical deletions

 

How to get access to the SAP BW/4HANA Group Reporting Model?

The service delivery is carried out by the CoE EMEA Team for Data Warehousing and Data Management as part of the Premium Engagement.

Below is an overview of the service delivery plan and the added value of the collaboration as part of the Premium Engagement.

Service Plan Proposal

  • Enablement Workshop for Data and Analytics is the service to get to understand the SAP BW/4HANA pilot data model and, based on customer-specific business demands, identify potential gaps resulting in a high-level design and project plan for the proof-of-concept phase (Jump Start Service).
  • Jump-start for Analytics and Data Management to deploy the pilot data model for SAP S/4HANA Group Reporting in customers SAP BW/4HANA sandbox system with the adjustments as scoped, testing, final sign-off including hand-over to the project team.
  • Safeguarding Services, on Performance Optimization (BPPO, TPO), Quality Assurance Assessments (FTC, TIC), Going Live Support, etc. complete the service plan proposal.

Value

  • Speed up Time-to-Value: Fast deployment of a proven pilot data model for SAP S/4HANA Group Reporting with SAP BW/4HANA.
  • Know-how-transfer how the data model works including key design considerations.
  • Utilize the know-how of SAP experts to reduce the TCO of the application model for Group Reporting in SAP BW/4HANA e.g., by understanding Data Tiering Optimization options.
  • Option to extend and enrich the model based on customers specific requirements for Group Reporting by the input and help of SAP experts.

If you are interested in getting in touch with us, you will find the necessary contacts in our Focus Package.

entry.title: XML parser error in receiver determination in pipeline concept while testing with Csv, pdf file.
entry.content:
Hi All,

We are getting error in receiver determination in pipeline concept while testing with Csv, pdf file via SFTP adapter.

Error:-  net.sf.saxon.trans.UncheckedXPathException: Error reported by XML parser processing null: Unexpected character 'P' (code 80) in prolog; expected '<'
at [row,col {unknown-source}]: [1,1

Does anyone have idea how to solve this error.

FYI, 

We are getting the error in the Pipeline Generic Step04 - Receiver Determination flow at XSLT mapping.

entry.title: Premium Hub CoE – DSC SAP TM : Extending TM Location with Additional Attributes
entry.content:
Extend TM Location with Additional Attributes

Standard SAP TM Location Attributes present are shown below.

Business has a requirement of some extra fields or attributes which will can be used to do operations on location like want to make that location where we can do nightly charges etc.

Location Table /SAPAPO/LOC provide provision for 5 Additional Fields (ATTLO01 to ATTLO05) which you can use.

To enable these fields on UI.

Run Transaction: SM30 and Maintain values /SAPAPO/V_FNMAT

Save and Open Location Again, You will see the extra fields on Location

Take note that the data type you cannot change for these attributes. You can read this data from location and use it for planning, Charge calculation operations etc.

Discover further insights into SAP Premium Engagement and explore how an international team of specialists can assist you in maximizing the value of your SAP solutions.

If you already are a Premium Engagement customer, contact your Technical Quality Manager (TQM) to discuss how Premium Engagement Service can help you with a custom-tailored and efficient service portfolio to make your project a success!

Best Regards,

Rohit

entry.title: Re: Setup VSCcode for SAP Commerce
entry.content:
Besides the "Just use another tool"-answer, I am trying to give a helpful answer here 😄
I think it is always good to give new/other IDEs a chance and play around with them... I have just started to test Visual Code as well and I was able to solve the issue by adding the folders single by single.
That means: go to the Files & Folders Explorer, Right-Click and choose "Add folder to workspace". If you have the the java extension pack installed, the project/extension will be loaded automatically into the "Java Projects" View. Hints in the "Problems" section will show you which projects might miss.

Usually you add all your custom extension and then add the required projects from /modules and /platform.

 

Cheers!
Eddy

entry.title: Re: SAP Datasphere Data Validations
entry.content:

thanks for this informative Blog.

One question came to my mind: Why do you have this validation inside a view, and not inside the table itself?

I mean if you have inconsistent data... then it is stored in the table, not the view... so, why placing the "Validate" button there?

Thanks, Martin

Best regards

entry.title: How to send notifications to Slack using Looply
entry.content:
Many business users work in Teams, but millions of users make use of Slack for collaboration.

SAP process notifications can be sent to Teams, to SMS or to Slack using this simple integration.

Follow these three steps to build this powerful integration:

1) Create an app on Slack

First of all you need to create an app within Slack.  This is free and easy, and takes only a few minutes in https://api.slack.com/apps

See the quickstart guide: https://api.slack.com/quickstart

You need to find the OAuth Token for the your app from the ‘OAuth & Permissions’ menu.

2) Set up a channel in Slack or choose an existing channel, and get the Channel ID from the ‘About’ tab.

You need to identify the channel ID that you are going to send the notification to.

3) Set up a Workflow in Looply

Create a simple workflow in the Looply Workflow Studio:

Call this workflow either externally or from another Looply workflow, passing in parameters for the notification in Slack.

In this example, we are passing in two text fields, ‘heading’ and ‘text’, from a separate Looply workflow:

Set up a function to add text formatting:

The definition of this function can be generated using Slack’s Block Kit Builder https://app.slack.com/block-kit-builder

 
return {
  "blocks": [
    {
      "type": "rich_text",
      "elements": [
        {
          "type": "rich_text_section",
          "elements": [
            {
            "type": "text",
            "text": params.heading,
            "style": {
              "bold": true
              }
            },
            {
            "type": "text",
            "text": params.text
            }
          ]
        }
      ]
    }
  ]
}

Finally, add the http request step to send the message to Slack, using the chat.postMessage api, passing in the Token code and the Channel ID:

Using this simple generic Workflow, you can send a notification to a channel with a heading in bold, and a text beneath.

 
This video shows the result:

entry.title: RIBA Expiry Date Shift
entry.content:
Hi everyone ,

I need to automatically move the deadlines for RIBA payments resulting from the invoicing of this end of the month and managed via tcode F110, from 31 August to 5 September. In these cases, is there an SAP Best Practice or an alternative solution? 

 

Thank you.

entry.title: How to Handle "Allocation failed; Reason: booked memory limit reached" Error in SAP HANA Procedure?
entry.content:
Hello SAP Community,

I am encountering an error when running my stored procedure in SAP HANA:

Error: (dberror) [129]: transaction rolled back by an internal error: Allocation failed; Reason: booked memory limit reached (SAP Note 3191224);

I have already modified the statement memory limit and global allocation limit settings to try and improve the memory usage, but the error persists.

My questions are:

  1. How can I allow the procedure to continue running even if it takes a long time without encountering this memory error?

    • I need the procedure to handle long-running processes and avoid termination due to memory issues. Are there specific settings or coding practices that can help achieve this?

  2. How can I optimize the memory usage in my SAP HANA procedure?

    • What are the best practices for improving memory efficiency in stored procedures? Are there any specific configurations or code optimizations that can help reduce the memory footprint?

Additional Context:

  • I am running this procedure on SAP HANA Cloud.
  • I have already tried increasing memory allocation settings but need more granular control and optimization.

Any guidance or suggestions would be greatly appreciated.

Thank you!

entry.title: Re: Table fields alignment using Row Component in SAP Build
entry.content:
If the fields in rows are not aligned, first turn on borders around cells. To do this click a cell, go to style, edit the style adding border: solid, 1px, any dark color. This will let you check if cells in rows are aligned or not.

If cells are not aligned, you definitely skipped definition of the width of one or more cells.

But if cells are aligned, this would mean that the cell content is not aligned. In this case click on each text in each cell and set alignment property to either "Left", "Center" or "Right". In the improbable case it still does not work it would mean that your data has white spaces in the displayed text.

If you add a new cell to your row, the new cell has undefined width, so you always have to edit cell widths after adding a new cell in the row. Otherwise the width of the cell will be dynamically set to fit the content.

entry.title: Re: Import data from AWS S3 to HANA Cloud
entry.content: Thanks, it is working fine

entry.title: S4: Customizing not active after import - table buffer issue
entry.content:
There is a problem in transport management on a SAP S/4HANA 2020 landscape hosted on Hyperscaler (private system).

Problem:

  • SAP Transport is released in the dev system, contains customizing of a maintenance view.
  • Transport Is imported in Q or Prod, but the customizing is not active after import.
  • Although the entries are changed in the underlying table (check in SE16H), they still appear unchanged in the view. The system contiues to behave in a way, that new customizing is not active.

The remedy is to manually reset all table buffers (/$SYNC), a system reboot will do the same.

I do not have this issue with other customer so much, so this must be a system setting? Basis Team cannot find the root cause. But we do not have this problem at all/other customers... so there must be some setting in the system?

entry.title: BAS Preview in Fiori Launchpad not showing any data
entry.content:
Hello everyone,

I'm relatively new to the world of SAP Fiori and am currently familiarizing myself with the subject. So far I have created a few simple, small apps in the Business Application Studio and mainly used the list view template there.

The data source are CDS Views with an "old" ECC 6.0 system and Netweaver 7.5 as the platform.

So far, it has never been a problem for me to try out the apps using the BAS preview function. It didn't matter whether I ran the preview without Launchpad or with Launchpad.

With my current app, however, the app suddenly doesn't work properly when I test it in the preview with Launchpad. All elements are displayed correctly (filters, columns in the table, etc.). Only when I click on the "Go" button there is no query. Nothing arrives in the backend either. I only get the message "no data found".

If I try the same thing without the Fiori Launchpad, the query is executed normally and I get a result. I am really at a loss as to how this can be...

No errors are listed in the browser console after the click. But something is already happening in the background, because an extension method (onBeforeRebindTableExtension) is called. But nothing arrives at the backend...

Do you have any idea what the problem could be or how I can track it down?

entry.content:

    • First generation college students

entry.title: Re: Can't convert Planned orders in /SAPAPO/RRP3 Txn to P...
entry.content:
Hi,

a change on the procurement type will not work in standard. If you have a planned order then in standard such a planned order will be converted into a production or process order.
If you get the conversion flag in //rrp3 then this planned order will be send to ECC or S4core like the planned order before just with the conversion flag. CIF_ORDER_INBOUND_30A is the first function which will reached and there based on the conversion flag and if the planned order was already created first in the system a real or a so called faked conversion will happen. As the procurement type is "E" inhouse .

That is done in function CIF_ORDER_INBOUND

where based on the order type "5" so a planned order will be send from PPDS

CASE ls_apoord-objecttype.
      WHEN gc_planned_order.           " Planauftrag
        IF NOT ls_apoord-convertnow IS INITIAL.
          IF  l_flg_prodord_proc IS INITIAL.
            l_flg_prodord_proc = 'X'.
          ENDIF.
          CALL FUNCTION 'CIF_PRODORD_CREATE_FROM_PLORD'
..
CALL FUNCTION 'CIF_PLDORD_INBOUND'
or..
CALL FUNCTION 'CIF_PRODORD_INBOUND'

will be called

In ECC or S4 you can convert a planned order into the purchase order yes, but this is not supported out of PPDS in standard.

entry.title: Re: One service order with multiple services
entry.content:
Hi,

You can use the Equipment ID as reference to the Service Order. In the Service Order, you can add 225 Service Order Items. For each item, you can specify the quantity and Product ID (can be service products).

Warm regards,

Dequan

AFAIK there are only get/list BAPI method on BO BUS3033 customer-material info record 

  • check function group CRM3 on your system
  • Read 626931 - FAQ: Customer material info record

Hello all,

I have a journal entry posting with an invoice as a reference document, that is currently parked in the Manage Journal Entries app. However, I do not know how I can post it.

I tried the Verify Journal Entries app, but I see no entry there. 

Can someone help?

Thanks in advance.

entry.title: Cloud Integration with SAP Integration Suite - The Comprehensive Guide: New Book Edition Released
entry.content:
Many have eagerly awaited a new edition of the popular SAP Cloud Integration book by Rheinwerk Publishing. As the world keeps turning and the development teams at SAP never rest, the SAP Integration Suite has established itself as a comprehensive integration solution and has evolved significantly, with Cloud Integration as its centerpiece and key capability.

And indeed, there is now a new edition of the book, titled "Cloud Integration with SAP Integration Suite - The Comprehensive Guide”.

Spanning 900 pages, this book provides a comprehensive description of all the capabilities of SAP Integration Suite, as expected from previous editions. It includes a wealth of tutorials and example scenarios that readers can model and execute independently and from scratch.

Whether you are an integration expert or aspire to become one, this book, written by Swati Singh, John Mutumba Bilay, and Shashank Singh (all from Rojo Consultancy B.V.), with a foreword by Andreas Quenstedt, chief product owner of SAP Integration Suite, is exactly what you need.

Designed to be a valuable resource for both beginners and experts in the field, the book gradually introduces concepts and tools starting from Chapter 2. It provides a step-by-step guide to designing and executing the first, simplest integration flow. Additional features and complexity are then added in the following chapters.

In addition, the book offers a variety of challenging use cases and tutorials that will engage and pique the curiosity of experts.

Compared to the third edition, the new edition includes the following new or significantly expanded topics:

  • The topic of event-driven integration has been added, demonstrating how to set up SAP Integration Suite's Advanced Event Mesh as an event hub
  • Connecting to an AS2 server with the AS2 adapter.
  • Working with script collections.
  • Advanced mapping techniques.
  • Extension of the monitoring feature, including external logging and integration with Splunk.
  • The chapter on connecting to external third-party systems using Open Connectors has been extended. It includes example scenarios showing integration with Salesforce and Amazon Web Services.
  • Migration scenarios, such as from Neo to Cloud Foundry and from SAP PO to Cloud Integration.
  • Joint usage of Cloud Integration together with the API Management capability.
  • Lastly, one major milestone of SAP Integration Suite is covered in a separate chapter: Edge Integration Cell.

We wish you an enjoyable reading experience and success in your integration projects!"

entry.title: Re: API for App 'Post unplanned Goods Issue' in S4Hana Cloud
entry.content:
Hi Geovana,

We have the same problem and business case for Public Cloud implementation project. 

Our client is requesting to make stock correction should happen from Storage bin level the trigger point is from EWM not from MM so that want post 711 and 712 movement type with warehouse task .

But given below API is not supported stock correction with 711 and 712 movement that only supports the unplanned goods issue for consumption and scrapping.

https://api.sap.com/api/CE_WHSEPHYSICALSTOCKPRODUCTS_0001/overview

Could you provide some useful solution or workaround to solve this issue? Your helps will be aprecated

PS: For Warehouse Physical Stock by Product - Read, Update (A2X) APİ is there any plan to develop stock correction in the near future?

Kind Regards,

Fahrettin

entry.title: Re: error on using "case" instead of "if" with "Applicati...
entry.content: Hi, thanks for your reply. I honestly didn't think of this easy solution as I expected the table to take over the order of the structure of the query . I am confused, that the order is shown completely randomly. But ok... Thanks Clemens

entry.title: Re: SAP CAP: different names for "EntityType" and "Entity...
entry.content:
This is the same answer I gave in the SAP Ticket system:

 

Dear Customer,

the importer will preserve the entity set name, not the type name, your example:

 <edmx:DataServices>
    <Schema Namespace="Asset" xmlns="...">
      <EntityContainer Name="EntityContainer">
        <EntitySet Name="AssetSet" EntityType="Asset.Asset"/>
      </EntityContainer>
      <EntityType Name="Asset">
        <Key>
          <PropertyRef Name="id"/>
        </Key>
        <Property Name="id" Type="Edm.Int32" Nullable="false"/>
      </EntityType>
    </Schema>
  </edmx:DataServices>

Recreate the CDL source from the imported API:

cds -2 cdl srv/external/asset.csn

@CDS.external : true
service asset {};
@CDS.external : true
@CDS.persistence.skip : true
entity asset.AssetSet {
  key id : Integer not null;
};

you can directly refer to the entity name AssetSet.

However, if you want to expose an entity type that had no entity set in the imported service, you can rename it with your local service projection (like in your example):

extend service mirror_api {
  entity AssetSet as projection on API.Asset;
}

CAP in general does not allow alternating names between EntityContainer entries and type definitions. Since in CAP CDS every service entity can become only one entity set, the names are the same.

entry.title: Re: How to allow any external SSCC number for HUs while s...
entry.content: So you need to create the same material (such as an EUR pallet) as multiple materials in SAP to enter external SSCC codes in HU02? That messes with our inventory then if the same pallets are registered as different material numbers, Is this really the intended way by SAP?

entry.title: Re: Password change by BAPI_USER_CHANGE
entry.content:
Hello,

I set up a CUA in my test system and did some tries. Assigning a new password in a client system with BAPI_USER_CHANGE (destination ...) works when in SCUM the setting for the "Initial password" is set to "Everywhere". If it is not set, you will find messages in the RETURN table of BAPI_USER_CHANGE ("User attribute "New password" cannot be maintained in this system. No changes were made to user ..."). So, if it is set to "Global" and you are using SU01 in CUA system for setting a new password for a user, you have to include/select the targeted systems in the list below the input fields for the password. Same is for generating a new password.
If you are using BAPI_USER_CHANGE locally on the CUA system, it seems no Idocs will be transferred to the client systems - although the "Global" setting is set for the initial password in SCUM. I do not know whether this is a bug - according to the documentation of the "Global" setting a distribution to the client systems should follow automatically.
So I guess this is what you are currently stumbling over right now. A workaround could be to set it to "Everywhere" or "Proposal" (which also allows the RFC use of BAPI_USER_CHANGE).

Kind regards

Jan

entry.title: Re: Hierarchy prompts variants are not working in webi report
entry.content:
Hello navakh,

I am facing the exact same issue in SAP BO 4.3 sp02 and ran into your post.

Any clue?

entry.title: Building My SAP Career - Seeking Guidance
entry.content:
Hello everyone,

I’m new here, and I'm looking to build relationships with SAP partners, customers, and other SAP professionals to get to know the ecosystem a bit better. I am Rashad, currently learning SAP implementation project tasks to deploy and extend SAP S/4HANA, and experiencing the SAP Business Technology Platform.

I am currently studying for my first certification [SAP Certified Associate - Implementation Consultant - SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition]. I decided to embark on this journey due to my interest in participating as a member of an SAP S/4HANA implementation project and building solutions using the capabilities that SAP BTP offers to extend and personalize SAP applications.

So far, I have dedicated significant time and effort to understanding and trying to master the concepts behind [SAP Cloud Identity, SAP Central Business Configuration, SAP Cloud ALM, SAP Fiori Launchpad], and I’ve made some great progress so far, but also feel it’s time to reach out to some veterans for real-world insights.

I wanted to share a little about my learning journey so far. With a college degree in finance and a strong passion for learning technology, I have spent 5 years honing my skills in various business processes and systems. I have been actively involved in digital transformation initiatives in my country, leveraging technology to optimize financial operations for various SMEs. Additionally, my skill set extends to [English (B2) and German (B1) language proficiency, Cloud Solution (simple architectures using AWS/Azure), Linux, and programming knowledge]. I am particularly interested in learning new tools and innovative technology, and I am eager to build on what I have so far in a way that makes sense for the modern SAP ecosystem.

While technical skills are crucial in our industry, I also realize that soft skills play a significant role in shaping successful professionals. I pride myself on my problem-solving, collaboration, leadership, flexibility, and adaptability.

I’m looking for folks with experience in the SAP FICO module to share some insights on what it’s like to actually implement it in the field.

What was your first project like? How long did it take?

What is the team dynamic like during one of your projects? Is it collaborative or more "siloed" with each expert working on what they know?

What part or feature of the SAP FICO module was most challenging to get working on the customer side?

What is the troubleshooting process like? Can you share a specific example of a troubleshooting scenario from a recent project?

I’d love to connect further and talk about your careers thus far with SAP and understand how you got to where you are today.

Best regards,

Rashad SAYED

entry.title: Equipment Card Search
entry.content:

When searching in equipment card window, in the list displayed, Item Number is showing Item Description. Is this a bug? In Item Description, it is showing the correct information. There are no other fields showing the Item Code.

SAP B1 is version 10.

 

Thank you.

entry.title: SAC - Number Format
entry.content:
Hello,

is it possible to dispaly numbers like 40'000 instead of 40,000 ?

 

Kr

entry.title: Simulations modes in the SAP Companion
entry.content:
Hi all,

I have some questions regarding the display of the simulations in the SAP Companion.

I have read in the SAP Companion Integration Guide (Configuring the Learning Section), that by default the parameter “learningAppProjectMode” has the value “uebung”, which means that all simulations are shown in Practice Mode in the SAP Companion.

In the context of an extended Workarea, using both standard and custom content, that will happen if we switch the parameter ““learningAppProjectMode” to “demo”?

If some simulations have only been provided initially in Practice mode (for instance the SAP standard content), will these simulations be hidden or still visible in the SAP Companion?

Is it possible to choose at simulation level (i.e. not globally), to display specific simulations only in Demo or Practice mode in the SAP Companion, or do all simulations need to be displayed in the same mode?

More generally is it possible to provide a mix of different modes of simulations in the Learning section of the SAP Companion?

entry.title: Re: During Sales Order creation , need to split line items when enter is pressed.
entry.content:
During Sales Order creation(in VA01) , User enters Material and quantity and press enter .

it has to be split into multiple line items based on Delivery unit .

For example : if quantity is 10 and delivery unit is 2  ..it has to be split into 5 line items .

Which enhancement to be used to achieve this functionality and what structures to be changed in this regard .

Thanks

entry.title: Appending existing standard CDS view with CDC annotation
entry.content:
Hi Gurus,
What is the best practice to change existing standard CDS view (example I_Actualplanjournalentryitem) to CDC enable. I understand, we can create custom view on top of this CDS view, but wanted to validate if this is correct and only way.
Any clue would be helpful.

entry.title: How to open SAP CAP Multitenant application?
entry.content: I want to open my SAP CAP Multi-tenant application from provider sub-account. When I click on app URL it is asking to enter credentials of SAP HANA XS Advanced. How to open the app in provider sub-account?

entry.title: How to access destination in consumer subaccount from mta.yaml file?
entry.content:
In my mta.yaml file of SAP CAP Multi-tenant application, I am using destination of SAP DMS as dms-api as shown in the attached screenshot. This destination I have created in provider sub-account. How to consume this destination in consumer sub-account? And, if I want to add new SAP DMS destination in consumer sub-account then how to add it in mta.yaml file?

I am using appRouter, in xs-app.json file I have added dms-api under routes

entry.title: Peer equity
entry.content:
Good morning! 

I would like to know what tools Success Factors (EC or any other module) offer to manage Internal Peer Equity and market benchmark (competitiveness).   

Where can I see standard solutions SF is offering on these topics? Any examples or material where I can see them in action?

Thanks!!

Cecilia

entry.title: Re: Missing permission to cancel Time Payout
entry.content: Thanks Thiago!

entry.title: 🇩🇪 SAP CodeJam SAP Fiori elements flexible programming model (Bielefeld, Germany)
entry.content:
This SAP CodeJam event is about the SAP Fiori elements flexible programming model (FPM). After a quick introduction to UI5, we will dive into the SAP Fiori elements and learn how to build a web application that allows users to browse and order books. Using the FPM, we will customise this SAP Fiori elements application. With this hands-on experience, you will be able to start developing your own SAP Fiori elements applications after this CodeJam.

The content for this SAP CodeJam is available on GitHub: https://github.com/SAP-samples/fiori-elements-fpm-exercises-codejam

This is an in-person event only (not virtual) and is planned for Friday 16 August 2024 from 09:00 - 15:00 local time. We will meet in the Steigenberger Hotel Bielefelder Hof. The event is hosted by consenso Consulting GmbH. The language of the event and the content will be English.

The instructor will be Developer Advocate Nico Schoenteich.

Please note that spaces are limited - we can only accommodate 25 attendees. Register here in the Community Event using the RSVP functionality.

For more information on SAP CodeJam events, to ask questions, and to chat with your fellow attendees, head over to the SAP CodeJam group.

entry.title: How can I activate sample management in the cloud?
entry.content: I cannot find sample management in the applications in the cloud for QM. Does anyone have an idea why this could be?

entry.title: Re: VSCode Fiori Adaptation Project Issue - SAP S/4HANA 1909 On-premise
entry.content:
Hello

in SAP BAS, there is an option to create an extension project instead, in such case of synchronous and asynchronous views (see bottom option in image):

I guess for both of your applications you can create an extension project instead of an adaptation project

KR

Nicolas

entry.title: Re: How to create a value help for custom and released domain fixed values?
entry.content:
Hello @Andre_Fischerit seems that one needs to pass a data element which then takes the underlying domain fixed values defined in the data element and not the domain name itself.

In your example there is also an dataelement BEL_API_RETCODE. When I call cl_abap_typedescr=>describe_by_name( domain_name )in se24 testmode with a domain name which has no identical data element it throws an exception "type_not_found".

Also: How did you achieve to display the text of the domainfixed values? I only see the values in the drowdown as @Pallava .

BR

entry.title: Re: Allocation with movement to layer
entry.content: Can you try putting the driver values on Allocation layer = 'Allocation step'

entry.title: Re: SAC Table - 3 Dimension Rows are merged to 1 Row auto...
entry.content: @William_Yu  BW Live. I use hundreds of BW Live Queries in SAC, but I never experienced this. So it comes from the BW side?

entry.title: How to get max date of intervention request
entry.content:
I've got a cross tab of all the interventions so it shows all the dates when the intervention have been requested. See attachment but example below.

How do I get it to only show the most recent request so in this case it would just show the 10/10/23 line?

Thanks in advanced.

 
Intervention ID Intervention Title                    Request Date                                     Count
S237                  Intervention Name                    27/09/2023                                          1
                                                                           10/10/2023                                           2

entry.title: Summertime Freshness: New Upgrade to SAP Business One Localized Demo Databases Now Available!
entry.content:
We are glad to announce that the SAP Business One localized demo databases have been upgraded to the latest release 10.0 FP 2405 and are available for download.

Along with the upgraded databases to release 10.0 FP 2405, we provide recent transactional data to make your demos look fresh and tidy!

The localized demo databases contain a pre-configured SAP Business One environment in 39 localizations. They are based on the model company OEC Computers and are offered for both the MS SQL version and the SAP HANA version of SAP Business One.

Demo, learn, teach, and test SAP Business One with fresh demo environment!

Download the Localized Demo Databases for SAP Business One

entry.title: Re: Allow connections to SAP HANA Cloud instance from selected IP addresses -- using the command lin
entry.content:
Hello Vitaly, 

do you know if there is a way to check, which client IPs are currently loggin in to a HANA cloud instance? I tried to get this information by enabling the audit log but there only the client DNS name is listes, not the internet IP that the client has. Are connections logged somewhere else including the source (Internet) IP? 

UPDATE:
Just found the answer to my question myself: In the audit trail you can activate the column "Client IP" to see the source IP of the connection. 

Thanks,
Markus

entry.title: Distribute Quantity in EWM Outbound Delivery Order
entry.content:
Hi Community,

I'm exploring some options to split an EWM Outbound Delivery Order item into multiple sub-items, and would like to try the "Distribute Quantity" function in the Outbound Delivery Order (see screenshot). However, when I try to execute this function I get the following error:

Item not relevant for quantity distribution - Message No. /SCWM/DELIVERY_UI087

I can't find any useful documentation which explains when an item is relevant for quantity distribution; hopefully someone in this community can help me out!

Thanks & regards,

Oliver Hahn

entry.title: How to use digital signatures for document legalization services?
entry.content: You could theoretically use SAP's digital signature as a business that needs to handle international legal documents. But how should these functionalities be used so that the digital signatures are legally binding and recognized internationally? I'm interested in the setup and operational requirements needed for this, as well as any specific modules or tools within SAP that can help. Thanks!

entry.title: Integrating MM SD creating SD sales order using PO
entry.content:
Hello SAP expert,

I have used this link https://community.sap.com/t5/enterprise-resource-planning-blogs-by-members/integrating-mm-amp-sd-modules-in-same-client-to-create-delivery-in/ba-p/13238322 to customize the MM SD integration flow.

I can generate the outbound idoc type ORDER05 but the inbound idoc is not generated. I have followed all the steps described carefully. If there was an issue during the creation of the sales order, at least an inbound idoc should be created in status 51?

I do not know where to look at to solve this issue.

thank your for your appreciate help

Best regards,

Christophe

entry.title: Re: SAP Enterprise Architecture Framework
entry.content:
Hello

In the article I just see some drawings, but not a clear description of a methodology or a framework. I'm still struggling to see what is SAP EAF in concrete terms.

SAP needs to disclose now and openly its methodology.

Reg,
Prakash

entry.title: Re: Production order confirmation - alert on material cso...
entry.content: Thanks for your reply. I'll go for this solution: I'll check how I can customize it to get the correct alert depending on the material type. Best regards, Yann

entry.title: Re: Assessment Cycle
entry.content:
In S/4 use Universal Allocation, although that by itself will not solve your problem.

In case you want to keep using secondary accounts, you can also create separate cycles per sender object with separate allocation structures.

Instead of assessment (which is by definition on a secondary account) you could also use distribution (on the original primary account).

entry.title: Re: Vendor consignment to own stock in MM managed storage location
entry.content: Hi, You can use Transfer Postings movement type "411 K"

entry.title: Promotion number not appear in VBKD
entry.content:
Hello Community, 

In  the sales order  the number of promotion field "WAKTION "  is empty in table VBKD 

In conditions record of the sales order the promotion is determined KONP-AKTNR ok ( and we can display the promotion in tcode WAK3 )

in the customizing  path logistics-general -Retail promotion -promotion determination in sales order- determination for sales area  is checked 

Is there any configuration missing to fill   VBKD -WAKtion field ? please advice 

Thank you

entry.title: Back to basics with SAP Cloud Application Programming Model (CAP) - part 18
entry.content: Now that we're more comfortable with CQL and expressing it in the affordances that the CAP Node.js layer provides for us, we'll define and implement a second function, this time one that's bound to an entity. Everyone welcome, especially beginners, come and join us for friendly chat and curiosity-driven learning-by-doing!

entry.title: Integration between sap service cloud version 2 with sap customer data cloud
entry.content:
Hi experts, 

Does anybody know about integration between SAP service cloud version 2 with SAP customer data cloud?

entry.title: Re: AI in SAP Ariba Invoicing - Intelligent Invoice Conversion
entry.content:
Updated Info on Feature NP-38357 - 

There are 2 updates on this feature (NP-38357) which will be helpful for SAP Partners/Customers while deploying into their Ariba sites.

1. Blank email without Any Attachment 
Currently, if supplier forgets to attach any Invoices to the email and tries to send an email then system is not throwing any error or undeliverable notification
The Internal SAP Team is working on fixing this functionality which will help suppliers to take immediate action on such blank emails.
This will be updated in upcoming 2407 SP Release.

2. Emails with Attachment File names in Chinese/Japanese or any other language except English.
If the email attachment name is in a language other than English, such as Japanese or Chinese, the attached invoice will not be converted to an SAP Business Network Invoice.
Suppliers must email invoice attachments in these situations with the file name in English as a workaround. The internal SAP team is trying to correct this behavior by the 2407 SP Release.

After fixing these 2 defects the supplier's experience with Invoicing will be improved.

entry.title: Bybit Referans Kodu: GOAT1944 - 2024 Bybit Davet Kodu
entry.content: Bybit referans kodunuz GOAT1944 olarak belirtilmiştir. Bu kodu kullanarak Bybit borsasına kayıt olurken "Referans Kodu" veya "Davet Kodu" alanına GOAT1944 yazmanız gerekmektedir. Bu kod ömür boyu geçerlidir ve Bybit'te işlem yaparken %40 komisyon indirimi sağlar.

entry.title: Реферальный код Bybit: GOAT1944 - 2024 Пригласительный код Bybit
entry.content: Ваш реферальный код Bybit указан как GOAT1944. При регистрации на бирже Bybit по этому коду необходимо в поле «Реферальный код» или «Пригласительный код» написать GOAT1944. Этот код действителен пожизненно и обеспечивает скидку 40% на комиссию при торговле на Bybit.

entry.title: Unable to Create Notification for Customer Services
entry.content:
We are migrating from ECC to SAP S/4 Hana Public Edition 2402 with Rise Package, In a Package we have also added Customer Service Module, it was also a part of DDA Scope item. Our implementation activities are stopped because of unavailability of total customer Service functionalities like,

1. Creation of Notification for customer Complaint

2. Warranty Management

3.Pricing strategy in service Order

My Question is if SAP is not yet released these functionalities, Why the offerings have been made? It's really disguising situation and being a remote MSME user its really upsetting us and loosing trust on SAP as above listed functionalities are basic need of customer service, Need immediate solution

entry.title: How WBS element alphanumeric number is picked while creating WBSelement in CJ11
entry.content:
Hi Experts

while creating WBS element in CJ11 transaction, how does system pick the alphanumeric numbers, where do we perform the configuration for picking up different WBS element one after the other

EX if we create WBS element as - DC-1031636802-SM

next one will be DC-1031636803-SM

 

where does we perform the configuration for the above

 

Regards

Jithendra Sivashankar

entry.title: Code de parrainage Bybit : GOAT1944 - Code d'invitation Bybit 2024
entry.content: Votre code de parrainage Bybit est indiqué comme GOAT1944. Lors de votre inscription à l'échange Bybit à l'aide de ce code, vous devez écrire GOAT1944 dans le champ « Code de parrainage » ou « Code d'invitation ». Ce code est valable à vie et offre une réduction de commission de 40 % lors des transactions sur Bybit.

entry.title: Unable to Create Notification for Customer Services
entry.content:
We are migrating from ECC to SAP S/4 Hana Public Edition 2402 with Rise Package, In a Package we have also added Customer Service Module, it was also a part of DDA Scope item. Our implementation activities are stopped because of unavailability of total customer Service functionalities like,

1. Creation of Notification for customer Complaint

2. Warranty Management

3.Pricing strategy in service Order

My Question is if SAP is not yet released these functionalities, Why the offerings have been made? It's really disguising situation and being a remote MSME user its really upsetting us and loosing trust on SAP as above listed functionalities are basic need of customer service, Need immediate solution

entry.title: Mã giới thiệu Bybit: GOAT1944 - Mã mời Bybit 2024
entry.content: Mã giới thiệu Bybit của bạn được ghi là GOAT1944. Khi đăng ký trao đổi Bybit bằng mã này, bạn cần viết GOAT1944 vào trường "Mã giới thiệu" hoặc "Mã mời". Mã này có giá trị trọn đời và giảm giá hoa hồng 40% khi giao dịch trên Bybit.

entry.title: Customer return - Data fro creating a delivery is incomplete (Customer) - M7278
entry.content:
Hello,

In case of customer return (Scope item - BKP), I would like to perform after an inspection result with the following activity 0015 'Transfer to Specified Stock' from a MM storage location to a EWM storage location (for IBD creation HID 'Inb.Deliv.Gds Mvmnt'). 

I get the following error message 'M7278 - Data for create a delivery is incomplete'.

My partner for the plant seems to be well created (and the link to customer and supplier is done), the shipping point determination too.

I don't find the root cause, do you have any ideas ? 

In advance, thanks.

Regards,

Nicolas

entry.title: Re: BAPI TO CREATE CUSTOMER MATERIAL INFO RECORD CLASSIFICATION (VD51)
entry.content:
RV_CUSTOMER_MATERIAL_UPDATE is an update task FM, so basically only contains some abap sql statement and no functional checks.

(Kind of FM not released and not intended for customer development, perform where-used search to find a correct wrapper)

entry.content:
We are migrating from ECC to SAP S/4 Hana Public Edition 2402 with Rise Package, In a Package we have also added Customer Service Module, it was also a part of DDA Scope item. Our implementation activities are stopped because of unavailability of total customer Service functionalities like,

1. Creation of Notification for customer Complaint

2. Warranty Management

3.Pricing strategy in service Order

My Question is if SAP is not yet released these functionalities, Why the offerings have been made? It's really disguising situation and being a remote MSME user its really upsetting us and loosing trust on SAP as above listed functionalities are basic need of customer service, Need immediate solution

entry.title: USING FORMULA & ROUTINES CAN I ASSIGN CUSTOM NUMBER RANGE TO SALES DOC TYPE FOR PARTICULAR SALESAREA
entry.content:
Hello Experts

I have a situation where client have single sales organization & multiple sales area, the client is requesting for external number range for particular sales area, & internal number range for all other sales area, In sap s/4 hana public cloud edition 2402 is it possibile to assign custom number range based on sales area to single sales doucment type (OR), can we use formula & routines for setting number range to same document type 

if the solution is available then please suggest how to achieve the same

Thanks

Rahul Singhal

entry.title: Re: Display illustrated message in list report page if th...
entry.content:
Hi,

Currently this is not possible, but this is a planned development just round the corner! So I hope you will able to see it out-of-the-box from fe (v4) in one of the upcoming releases!

Best Regards,

   Sandeep

entry.title: Workflow User Issue
entry.content:
Hi All,

ABAP Development SAP Workflow Management 

In a PO Release Workflow have fork with 5 branches , First branch mail will be send to user outlook once PO created/ changed he apporove/reject there , if he approve PO gets released then workflow end.

Next Branch , User will go to ME28 and release the PO then PO gets released ,Mail will be send workflow ends.

Issue is for one user when he use ME28 to Release ,PO is Released/Released event occured  but Mail step not Triggered .

 

I have tried using SWUE event is tiggered ,Mail step is completed.This issue is happening only when using ME28 for xxxx User , No issue with other users

Difference I noticed ,When Release through SWUE

 

When Release happening through ME28, I see here internal RFC call.

 

Please Guide here.

entry.title: Re: Submissions for "SAP HANA Cloud multi-model" developer challenge: Week 4 - Geospatial
entry.content:

Thanks @Vitaliy-R for this learning opportunity.

Cairo to Buenos Aires

entry.title: Re: Create Button Group on Object Page Header in Fiori Elements
entry.content:
Hi,

If you are talking about application defined actions (like the manifest based ones or the annotation based ones), grouping is indeed possible. Please see V4 specific section "Grouping Actions as Menu Buttons" in page for more information.

Best Regards,

   Sandeep

entry.title: Re: SAP Datasphere Data Validations
entry.content:
Hi @JulianJuraske,

The validations framework  has been released with a goal of preventing the run time errors and to assist the modeller for an efficient modeling. As informed in the blog, there will be more validations coming up and based on the depth of validation further decisions on including them as part of task chain can be considered. 

Br,

Mona

entry.title: Re: Create Button Group on Object Page Header in Fiori El...
entry.content:
Hi,

If you are talking about app-defined actions (manifest based ones or annotation based ones), grouping is indeed possible. Please see V4 specific section "Grouping Actions as Menu Buttons" in page for more information.

Best Regards,

   Sandeep

entry.title: Re: Invoicing in SAP Ariba
entry.content: Feature NG-6369: Enhancement for Japanese Invoices to Display Tax Rate of Line Items has been delayed and will be available for all Customers/Partners in upcoming Q3 2408 Release.

entry.title: Exception during start of deployment for deploy type 'SLP_CTS': Error during client creation: Unauth
entry.content:
He have configured the TMS for transport iflowb between our accounts but when we want to do a transport it fails in the last step, importing transport request with the next error:

Exception during start of deployment for deploy type 'SLP_CTS': Error during client creation: Unauthorized

The target destination is configured as - https://deploy-service.cfapps.<domain>/slprot/<myorg>/<myspace>/slp

wiht basic authentication. The user has the space developer role. We're stucked with this question.

Any alternative? Thanks in advance.

entry.title: Re: Submissions for "SAP HANA Cloud multi-model" developer challenge: Week 1 - Setup
entry.content: Better late than never... 😄

entry.title: Re: provider contract inconsistency
entry.content:
Hi Subbareddy2,

The error message doesn't come from Convergent Charging.
Still, if you need to analyse what happened within Convergent Charging, you can enable the "WS" debug traces in the updater and then reproduce the scenario.
This can be done using either the Cockpit web UI, or admin+.sh with the two following commands:
set LS_TRC_DOMAIN WS memory updater
set LS_TRC_SEVERITY DEBUG memory updater

Then, you'll see the SOAP dumps in the updater's TRC files, and it'll tell you whether CC faces issues or not.
Can you please try that and let us know the outcome?

Thanks, and best regards.

François
SAP Convergent Charging Support

entry.title: Re: Cloud Integration - How to configure Session Handling in Integration Flow
entry.content:
Hi Mandy,
Thank You for the nice blog. Would is the key of a session/backend? To take care that the session is reused, need all channels which should use the same session point to the same receiver? Or would the session be reused even if I use several receiver for the same backend? I do not like picture like this:

Thanks
Bernd

entry.title: Re: SAP Commerce Cloud - Data Migration in Action
entry.content:
@mateuszporzucek very nice extensive blog .

Some comments/additional hints:
- the DB prefix is in my opinion optional; helpful only when you want to switch between the 2 "versions".
- Always: Do a Snapshot after the initialization of the DB. Otherwise you might have a non-functional system after a not-successful DB migration and need to ask SAP for a DB wipe which can take a couple of days .... 
- the cloud db is encrypted by default, which means if you have your onPrem DB not encrypted, you will have a login problem. An option is to ask SAP per ticket to remove the encryption (per environment) and only then do the db migration. 

- Use the snapshot function to populate other environments.

Related to that: There is a recommendation by SAP to change the db encryption regularly, but the SAP documentation could be more detailed ... (especially related to the masterpassword change).  If you want to do another blog, maybe you want to consider this topic ....

entry.title: Re: Withholding Tax in Manage Supplier Line Items
entry.content: Thank you for adding the tag. "SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition" tag has been removed.

entry.title: Formatted Search for Bin Location Allocation
entry.content:
Hello Experts, Hope you are well!

I am currently trying to develop a new FMS UDF to integrate into our Goods Receipt PO table in the aim to display the allocated BIn location for each line. however my logic need some work:

SELECT  T1.[BinCode] FROM PDN1 T0  INNER JOIN OBIN T1 ON T0.DftBinAbs = T1.AbsEntry WHERE T0.[ItemCode] = $[861.3.0]

Is this somthing that is possible to achieve?

entry.title: Codice di riferimento Binance: CERJSB5V - 2024 ID di riferimento Binance
entry.content: Il tuo codice di riferimento Binance è indicato come CERJSB5V. Quando ti registri all'exchange Binance utilizzando questo codice, devi scrivere CERJSB5V nel campo "Codice riferimento" o "ID di riferimento". Questo codice è valido a vita e fornisce uno sconto sulle commissioni del 30% quando si fa trading su Binance.

entry.title: Re: Enhancing Customer Experience : ChatGPT and SAP FSM Integration
entry.content: Great post. Is this explanation chargeable or free?

entry.title: Re: Integrating SAP S/4HANA Public Cloud with Whatsapp
entry.content: Thankyou for providing the architecture for the integration process but I require the architecture and methodology specifically for SAP S/4HANA Public Cloud.

entry.title: Editar casilla Factura ventas Importe del Impuesto
entry.content:
Hola a todos!

en ocasiones tenemos discrepancia en las facturas clientes en el impuesto.

En proveedores, la casilla "importe del impuesto" se la deja modificar cuando alguna discrepancia en el importe del IVA por redondeos.

En clientes, este campo no podemos editarlo. ¿Hay alguna forma de mantener el campo editable en ventas también igual que está en compras?

entry.title: Is the ChatGPT extension free for FSM, or do we have to pay for it?
entry.content:
Dear All,

I want to add the ChatGPT extension to our FSM system. I would like to know if it is free or if we have to pay for it. Additionally, is there any demo trial available for a specific period?

Regards,

Sakil Ahmed

entry.title: Re: I have added custom object under multiprovider but it...
entry.content:
I'm not sure what the expectation is here. If you mapped the fields of the additional providers in the MPRO and if you put those fields into either a column, row or free characteristic in the query designer, then the content of those partproviders are requested during query runtime.

 

If you want to filter on data of a specific partprovider, use 0INFOPROV to restrict.

entry.title: Re: SAP Datasphere Data Validations
entry.content:
Hi @MKreitlein ,

At the moment, the main objective of the validation framework is to assist and prevent the modeling run time error and that's why currently the views are considered for validations. But as you mentioned in terms of key and null validations, we can push it to table as well. More information on this will be updated on road map explorer - Additional model validations very soon.

Br,

Mona

entry.title: Re: Combination of FioriElements & UI5 Freestyle in CAP
entry.content:
Hi,

Yes, you can control the navigation target via means described in page (see section "Enable External Navigation")

Best Regards,

   Sandeep
